name: rin
description: RIN local-first single-owner personal agent system. RIN 是本地优先、单一所有者的个人智能体系统。

scripts.rin:check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run rin:readiness && npm run rin:memory-eval
scripts.live2d:source: npm run live2d:assets && npm run live2d:verify-runtime && npm run live2d:source-psd && npm run live2d:verify-source-psd
scripts.rin:full-check: npm run rin:check && npm run rin:semantic-eval && npm run rin:semantic-readiness && npm run rin:semantic-index-report && npm run rin:semantic-live-index-report && npm run rin:hybrid-retrieval-report && npm run rin:semantic-trace-list && npm run rin:semantic-trace-read && npm run rin:memory-maintenance-report && npm run rin:planner-smoke && npm run rin:planner-execution-smoke && npm run rin:planner-audit-report && npm run rin:actions-smoke && npm run rin:actions-audit-report && npm run rin:backup-dry-run && npm run rin:backup-encrypted-smoke && npm run rin:restore-dry-run
scripts.rin:v0-3-check: npm run rin:v0-2-check && npm run rin:external-model-smoke && npm run rin:project-report && npm run rin:actions-audit-report && npm run rin:rollback-notes
scripts.rin:v0-4-check: npm run rin:v0-3-check && npm run rin:memory-health-report && npm run rin:memory-conflict-report && npm run rin:memory-governance-smoke
scripts.rin:v0-5-check: npm run rin:v0-4-check && npm run rin:tool-registry-smoke && npm run rin:mcp-boundary-smoke && npm run rin:tool-audit-report
scripts.rin:v0-6-check: npm run rin:v0-5-check && npm run rin:task-smoke && npm run rin:task-audit-report
scripts.rin:v0-7-check: npm run rin:v0-6-check && npm run rin:device-report && npm run rin:sync-dry-run && npm run rin:migration-check
scripts.rin:v0-8-check: npm run rin:v0-7-check && npm run rin:body-smoke && npm run rin:body-state-report
